lore.english:
A demon princess of the Arachnes who rules the extensive and warm part of the demon realm. She came to the human world to seek the cause of the endless abnormalities that began to appear in her territory after the two realms were connected.

She may look like a young, beautiful girl, but in truth, she is sly and knowledgeable, as she's lived for so long. Her personality could also seem somewhat aloof, but her true nature is that of a cold-blooded predator who only cares for her tribe's profits.

Powerful in combat, as she is the princess of a demonic tribe, she uses her webs to absorb life energy from organisms to sustain her youth and recovery. As long as she can siphon energy, she is immortal.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Tsuchigumo's Net[-]
skills.description:
Throws a bundle of spider webs at the enemy.
Target hit by the web bundle is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:770102]%)[-] [&SpdDown] at a[&Color_Cyan][R:770102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn] : [V2:770102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Call of Anubis[-]
skills.description:
Spreads a wide web to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Targets hit by the web are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:770202]%)[-] [&Poison] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:770202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn] : [V2:770202] turn(s)
If the target has 4 or more [&DeBuff]s, absorbs [&Color_Cyan]([V3:770203]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:770203]%[-] chance on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast]. 
If the target's [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] is less than [&Color_Cyan]30%[-], they are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:770204]%)[-][&Poison] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:770204]%[-] chance [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn] : [V2:770204] turn(s)
